faq.a: Most property shoots take 1-3 hours depending on size and services booked. A full package with video, drone and 3D tour typically takes 3-4 hours.
faq.q: How long does a typical shoot take?

faq.a: Standard turnaround is 48 hours for photos, 5 business days for video and 3D tours. Rush delivery is available upon request.
faq.q: How quickly will I receive my photos?

faq.a: Absolutely! We offer discounts for multiple properties. Many property managers book us for their entire portfolio.
faq.q: Do you photograph multiple properties?

faq.a: For exterior and drone work, we monitor weather closely and will reschedule at no extra cost if conditions aren't ideal.
faq.q: What if the weather is bad on shoot day?

faq.a: Yes — you receive full commercial usage rights. Use them on Airbnb, Booking.com, your website, social media, or anywhere else.
faq.q: Can I use the photos on any platform?

faq.q: How many products can I send per session?
faq.a: A standard shoot handles 3–10 products depending on complexity. Multiple products with many angles and setups should be discussed in the brief.

faq.q: Can I send my products by post?
faq.a: Yes! Many clients ship products to our Dublin studio. We photograph them and ship back. Just let us know when booking.

faq.q: Do you provide props and styling?
faq.a: Yes — props, surfaces, fabrics and styling are all included. Share your brand references and we'll build the right setup.

faq.q: What file formats will I receive?
faq.a: You receive high-res JPEGs for print, optimised WebP/JPEGs for web and PNG with transparent background where applicable.

faq.q: Can you retouch photos I already have?
faq.a: Absolutely. We offer standalone retouching and editing for existing photos. Just send samples and we'll quote you.

seo.title: Portrait & Headshot Photography Dublin | Corporate, Personal Branding & Creative | Vinicius Murari
seo.description: Professional portrait and headshot photography in Dublin. Black & white background, ambient sessions, portable studio available on-site. 48h delivery for corporate teams and personal brands.

hero.headline:
The Photo That
Opens Doors.
hero.pillText: Studio & on-location bookings open in Dublin
hero.trustLine: Trusted by 200+ professionals, executives & creatives across Dublin
hero.subheadline: Your portrait is seen before your CV, your pitch deck, and your handshake. In 7 seconds it either opens doors — or closes them.

problem.headline: A Bad Photo Is Costing You Opportunities
problem.text: A blurry selfie, a cropped group shot, an outdated corporate photo from five years ago — every day you keep the wrong portrait online, someone with a better one is getting the meeting, the callback, or the deal. First impressions happen in 7 seconds. Online, they happen before you even speak.

services.title: White Background
services.description: Clean, sharp, timeless. The white background headshot that works on LinkedIn, company bios, press kits and email signatures — professional in every context.

services.title: Black Background
services.description: Bold, dramatic, high-contrast authority. The black background portrait commands attention — ideal for speakers, executives, creatives, and anyone who wants presence before they say a word.

services.title: Ambient & Lifestyle
services.description: Portraits with personality. Natural light, real environments — your office, a café, outdoors. Authentic and relaxed for personal brands, coaches, and creatives who want to show who they are, not just what they do.

services.title: Portable Studio On-Site
services.description: We bring the studio to you. Full professional setup — lighting, backdrops, equipment — delivered to your office, event, or venue. Consistent, polished headshots for your entire team without a single commute.

process.title: Brief
process.text: Tell us your goals, industry, and where you'll use the photos. We align on style, background, and wardrobe before you arrive — no surprises on the day.

process.title: Session
process.text: A relaxed 60–90 min shoot with full direction. No awkward freezing — we guide every pose and expression so you look like yourself at your best.

process.title: Select
process.text: Browse your private online gallery within 24h and choose your favourites. We help you pick the ones that work hardest for your goals.

process.title: Deliver
process.text: Professionally retouched finals ready in 48h. Web-optimised and print-ready files, delivered straight to your inbox.

testimonials.name: David K.
testimonials.text: I updated my LinkedIn on a Tuesday. By Friday I had two unsolicited recruitment calls. The photo finally looks like the person I am in the room.

testimonials.name: Emma L.
testimonials.text: I'd been putting off proper photos for two years. The session was 90 minutes — the results changed how I show up online completely. Worth every cent.

testimonials.name: Roisín F.
testimonials.text: As an actor, headshots are my CV. Vinicius understood castability immediately — not just photography. I got called back for three roles the week I updated my Spotlight profile.

faq.q: What should I wear?
faq.a: Solid colours work best — avoid busy patterns. Bring 2–3 outfit options if possible. During the brief we'll advise based on your background choice and goals.

faq.q: How long does the session take?
faq.a: Essential headshots take 45–60 minutes. Personal branding sessions with multiple looks run 90 minutes to 2 hours. Team on-site sessions are scheduled by volume.

faq.q: When will I receive my photos?
faq.a: Your retouched gallery is delivered within 48 hours of your session. Rush 24h delivery is available on request.

faq.q: Do I need modelling experience?
faq.a: Not at all. Most of our clients have never been professionally photographed before. We guide every pose and expression — you just need to show up.

faq.q: Can you come to our office for team photos?
faq.a: Yes — that's exactly what the portable studio is for. We set up a full professional backdrop and lighting at your location. Teams of any size, no commute required.

process.title: Brief
process.text: Share your menu, brand guidelines, and where the photos will be used. We plan the shoot list, props, and style before the day so every minute on set counts.

process.title: Shoot
process.text: Studio or in your kitchen and dining room. We work with your team — minimal disruption, maximum results. Most shoots are completed in a single day.

testimonials.name: Marco R.

faq.q: Do you provide styling and props?
faq.a: Yes — props, surfaces, linens, and garnish styling are all included. Share your brand references and we'll build the right setup. You can also provide your own props if preferred.

faq.q: Can you shoot in our restaurant kitchen?
faq.a: Absolutely. We regularly shoot on-location in working kitchens and dining rooms. We schedule around service hours to minimise disruption.

faq.q: How many dishes can you shoot in a day?
faq.a: A full-day shoot typically covers 20–40 hero shots depending on complexity and styling. A half-day covers 8–15. We'll agree on a shot list in advance.

faq.q: What file formats will I receive?
faq.a: You receive high-res JPEGs for print and menus, optimised web JPEGs for website, and square/portrait crops for social media — all in one delivery.

faq.q: Do you work with food delivery platforms like Deliveroo or Just Eat?
faq.a: Yes — we create optimised images specifically for delivery platform listings, following their technical specs to maximise visibility and click-through.
